description_long: This beach chair features a minimalist, modern design with a single continuous surface forming both the seat and the backrest, upholstered in a light beige fabric. The seat is wide and gently curves upward at the front edge, providing ergonomic support for lounging. The backrest is tall and slightly reclined, offering ample support for the upper body. The chair is supported by two sturdy, angular wooden legs that are set at an angle for stability and visual interest. The upholstery appears smooth and tightly fitted, with no visible seams or tufting, contributing to its sleek appearance. The overall construction suggests comfort and durability, suitable for outdoor or urban park settings.
description: A modern, minimalist beach chair with a continuous beige upholstered surface and angled wooden legs, designed for ergonomic lounging and visual appeal.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat seat and tall, seamless backrest with angled wooden legs barely visible beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the gentle curve of the seat and the backward slant of the tall backrest, as well as the angular wooden leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full height of the backrest and the two wooden legs extending outward for stability.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the continuous curve from seat to backrest and the supporting wooden leg.
